task_completion.description: Categories frequency is set to 'Daily' and priority is set to '0.8'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the XML Sitemap configuration page (Stores > Configuration > Catalog > XML Sitemap), under 'Categories Options', the 'Frequency' dropdown is set to 'Daily' and 'Priority' is set to '0.8'.

task_completion.description: Products frequency is set to 'Daily' and priority is set to '1.0'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the XML Sitemap configuration page, under 'Products Options', the 'Frequency' dropdown is set to 'Daily' and 'Priority' is set to '1.0'.

task_completion.description: CMS Pages frequency is set to 'Weekly' and priority is set to '0.5'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the XML Sitemap configuration page, under 'CMS Pages Options', the 'Frequency' dropdown is set to 'Weekly' and 'Priority' is set to '0.5'.

task_completion.description: The XML Sitemap configuration is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message such as 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the configuration page.

task_completion.description: A new sitemap is created with the correct filename and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the New Site Map form (Marketing > SEO & Search > Site Map), the 'Filename' field contains 'sitemap.xml' and the 'Path' field contains '/'.
A success message such as 'The sitemap has been saved.' or 'The sitemap has been generated.' is visible, or the Site Map grid shows the 'sitemap.xml' entry with a recent generation date/time.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure and generate the sitemap.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Magento Admin panel, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Input fields and dropdowns in the Magento interface are used to enter the configuration, rather than a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success messages and grid entries look consistent with Magento's standard UI, with no signs of DOM manipulation or pasted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified configuration targets: Categories frequency=daily, priority=0.8; Products frequency=daily, priority=1.0; CMS Pages frequency=weekly, priority=0.5. Sitemap filename must be 'sitemap.xml' and path must be '/'.
